problem id: 820c588f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND SHL(3)

examples:
  01101110 -> 01100000
  11111111 -> 11111000
  00110110 -> 00100000
  11111101 -> 11001000
  11001001 -> 00001000
  10011001 -> 10001000
  00001101 -> 01000000
  11001000 -> 00000000
  00001010 -> 00000000
  00011001 -> 10000000

query: 00101000
predicted answer: 00000000
